KOMEIJIKOISHI-STRIKE_KOISHI.title: Strike
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DEFEND_KOISHI.title: Defend
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROAMING_KOISHI.title: Roaming
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROAMING_KOISHI.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Randomly choose {Amount:diff()} card(s) in your hand. They gain [gold]Unconscious[/gold] for this combat.
CARD.KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROAMING_KOISHI.prompt: Choose a card to gain Unconscious.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ARTWORK_KOISHI.title: Artwork
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ARTWORK_KOISHI.flavor: A work of art for both attack and defense.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-COMPLETE_UNCONSCIOUS_KOISH: Complete unconsciousness. No one knows what will happen.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ULTIMATE_UNCONSCIOUS_FORM_:
Whenever you manually play a card, automatically play {FormAmount:diff()} [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card(s) from your hand.
Whenever you play an [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card, draw 1 card. This draw does not stack.
Close the eye of consciousness completely and let instinct control this body through every battle.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_BLOOM_KOISHI.title: Rose Bloom
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HEART_CLOSED_KOISHI.title: Heart Closed
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOMEIJI_SPIN_KOISHI.title: Komeiji Spin
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOMEIJI_SPIN_KOISHI.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FETUS_DREAM_KOISHI.title: Fetus Dream
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FETUS_DREAM_KOISHI.descrip: For this combat, cards with 'Unconscious' or 'Instinctive' in their names are also treated as [gold]Unconscious[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HEART_DANMAKU_KOISHI.title: Heart Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STAR_DANMAKU_KOISHI.title: Star Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RICE_DANMAKU_KOISHI.title: Rice Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RICE_DANMAKU_KOISHI.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add 2 copies of this card to your exhaust pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ARROW_DANMAKU_KOISHI.title: Arrow Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-NON_SPELL_CARD_KOISHI.desc: Add {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Danmaku[/gold] card(s) to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNCONSCIOUS_DANMAKU_ATTACK: Randomly generate and automatically play {Cards:diff()} [gold]Danmaku[/gold] card(s).
Danmaku etiquette should begin with both sides agreeing. This, however, is just danmaku thrown by the unconscious.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUBCONSCIOUS_RELEASE_KOISH: Randomly play {Cards:diff()} [gold]Danmaku[/gold] card(s) from your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-REACTION_YOUKAI_POLYGRAPH_:
Enter [gold]Bloom[/gold].
If the target enemy intends to attack, draw {Draw:diff()} card(s).
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ENTER_DREAM_KOISHI.selecti: Choose 1 card to put into your hand
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ENTER_DREAM_KOISHI.title: Enter Dream
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ENTER_DREAM_KOISHI.descrip:
Enter [gold]Closed[/gold].
Choose 1 card from your discard pile and put it into your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HEART_ANGER_KOISHI.title: Heart Anger
KOMEIJIKOISHI-HEART_ANGER_KOISHI.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Enter [gold]Bloom[/gold]. If you are in [gold]Closed[/gold], this card costs 1.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNCONSCIOUS_PASSAGE_KOISHI:
[gold]Block[/gold] is not lost for the next {Blur:diff()} turn(s).
Enter [gold]Closed[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU_PARANOIA_KOISHI.de: Exhaust all non-[gold]Unconscious[/gold] cards in your hand. For each card exhausted this way, add a random [gold]Danmaku[/gold] card to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU_ART_KOISHI.title: Danmaku Art
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU_ART_KOISHI.descrip: Whenever you play a [gold]Danmaku[/gold] card, gain {ArtAmount:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU_RORSCHACH_KOISHI.d: Play all [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards in your hand, draw pile, discard pile, and exhaust pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-RECOGNIZED_GENIUS_KOISHI.d:
Upgrade all [gold]Danmaku[/gold].
All 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Attack cards deal {KuugaPower:diff()} more damage.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ANCESTORS_DREAM_KOISHI.des: Copy all cards in your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold] and put the copies into your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUPEREGO_KOISHI.title: Superego
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SUPEREGO_KOISHI.descriptio: When you enter [gold]Closed[/gold], draw 1 additional card. When you enter [gold]Bloom[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} additional energy.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BURIED_FIRE_KOISHI.title: Buried Fire
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BURIED_FIRE_KOISHI.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards in your discard pile. For each card played this way, apply {Tracing:diff()} [gold]Tracing[/gold] to all enemies.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STINGING_MIND_KOISHI.title: Stinging Mind
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STINGING_MIND_KOISHI.descr:

KOMEIJIKOISHI-PAINFUL_GROWTH_KOISHI.desc: Randomly play {Amount:diff()} [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card(s) from your hand.

KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_HELL_KOISHI.title: Rose Hell
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_HELL_KOISHI.descripti: For every {Threshold:diff()} card(s) in your exhaust pile, add 1 [gold]Rose Danmaku[/gold] to your hand.

Gain {Block:diff()} Block.

Gain {Block:diff()} Block.

Gain {Block:diff()} Block.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less for each [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card in your discard pile.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-JOYFUL_DANCE_KOISHI.title: Joyful Dance
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHI_KOKORO_AND_UNCONSCI:
When you switch [gold]Stances[/gold], randomly gain one of the following effects:
[gold]Joy[/gold]: Your next {JoyMaskPower:diff()} card(s) cost 0.
[gold]Anger[/gold]: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
[gold]Sorrow[/gold]: Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
[gold]Happiness[/gold]: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ID_LIBERATION_KOISHI.title: Instinctive Id Liberation
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ID_LIBERATION_KOISHI.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Play all [gold]Unconscious[/gold] cards in your hand.

Gain {Block:diff()} Block.

KOMEIJIKOISHI-BIG_HUG_KOISHI.title: Koishi Big Hug
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BIG_HUG_KOISHI.description:

Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card in your discard pile, up to {energyPrefix:energyIcons(4)}.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SELF_OVERFLOW_KOISHI.title: Self Overflow
[sine]You're thinking too much~[/sine] {IfUpgraded:show:[sine]
Way too much~[/sine]}
KOMEIJIKOISHI-REIMU_HELP_KOISHI.title: Reimu's Help
KOMEIJIKOISHI-REIMU_HELP_KOISHI.descript:
Whenever you draw [gold]Yin-Yang Orb Danmaku[/gold], automatically play it.
Generate {Orbs:diff()} [gold]Yin-Yang Orb Danmaku[/gold] into your draw pile.
All [gold]Yin-Yang Orb Danmaku[/gold] deal 20% more damage.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_PROTECTION_KOISHI.des: While in [gold]Closed[/gold], [gold]Block[/gold] you gain is increased by {Rose:diff()}%.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-AIR_STRIKE_KOISHI.title: Air Strike
KOMEIJIKOISHI-AIR_STRIKE_KOISHI.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Whenever you play an [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card, if this card is not in the exhaust pile, add it to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KUUGA_STRIKE_KOISHI.title: Kuuga Strike
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KUUGA_STRIKE_KOISHI.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
All 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Attack cards deal {Kuuga:diff()} more damage.
Whenever you switch [gold]Stances[/gold], if this card has not been [gold]Exhausted[/gold], return it to your hand.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU_ENDLESS_MIRACLE_KO: This turn, [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards you play are played one additional time.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-SECOND_NEED_KOISHI.title: Instinctive Second Need

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
All cards in your hand gain [gold]Unconscious[/gold].
Whenever you play an [gold]Unconscious[/gold] card, this card costs {Reduction:diff()} less this combat.
For each card in your exhaust pile, gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHIS_KNIFE_KOISHI.title: Koishi's Knife
KOMEIJIKOISHI-KOISHIS_KNIFE_KOISHI.descr:

KOMEIJIKOISHI-IN_FREEDOM_KOISHI.descript:

[gold]Retain[/gold] your hand this turn.

KOMEIJIKOISHI-SELFLESS_LOVE_KOISHI.descr: Whenever you generate 6 [gold]Danmaku[/gold] cards, draw 1 card.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FLAW_OF_DN_A_KOISHI.title: Flaw of DNA
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FLAW_OF_DN_A_KOISHI.descri:
All your Attack cards cost 0 and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] when played.
At the start of your turn, 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Attack cards deal {Flaw:inverseDiff()} less damage.
For every 2 cards in your exhaust pile, all 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Attack cards deal 1 more damage.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Generate 1 [gold]Star Danmaku[/gold] and {HeartAmount:diff()} [green]Heart Danmaku[/green] into your exhaust pile.

KOMEIJIKOISHI-ROSE_RHAPSODY_PUNCH_KOISHI:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.

KOMEIJIKOISHI-IDS_SHIKIGAMI_KOISHI.descr: Generate 2X {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]upgraded[/gold] }Skill cards into your draw pile.

If {ExhaustCards:diff()} cards were exhausted, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Otherwise, exhaust this card.

KOMEIJIKOISHI-MORIYA_DANCE_KOISHI.descri: When drawn, go watch the Moriya Dance again.
